_comment_1: Real openclaw.json shape for 2026.4.10 — confirmed via `openclaw config schema`. Three things to configure: (1) register the server under mcp.servers, (2) allow-list it on a specific agent, (3) maybe flip the ACPX bridge. See README.md for the ordered probes.
_1_register_via_cli: Preferred — avoids editing JSON by hand:

_2_per_agent_allowlist.note: Patch the mc-writer entry inside $.agents.list. The allowlist-string format is one of the three unknowns the spike answers — start with candidate A, iterate through B/C/D in the README if A doesn't surface the tool.

_3_acpx_bridge_fallback.note: Only needed if the top-level mcp.servers path doesn't surface the tool to any agent regardless of allowlist candidate. Merge into $.plugins.entries.acpx.config

_cleanup_stale_block: Also delete the old `plugins.entries.mcp-adapter` block from ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json — openclaw warns about it at every startup.
